actionUnits.condition: This target has a BoxCollider (no Rigidbody), allowing Trigger interactions. The attached MonoBehaviour matches the provided Fire script (m_Script guid: 1729fd01c90a64d5b8037e1eef0d000d) and its serialized fields as shown in the scene meta (isOn=0, timeToOnMin=40, timeToOnMax=60, totalHitTime=5, downMultiplier=2, onNeighborsThreshold=2, mainEffectGo fileID: 1849464941111748095, neighbors=[]). There are no UnityEvents (m_Calls) on this component and no public parameterless methods to invoke via Trigger. To cover runtime behavior (turning off via water hits, turning on via neighbors), an external system must call Fire.WaterHit(Vector3) repeatedly within maxHitInterval until totalHitTime elapses, and/or adjust neighbor state so onNeighbors >= onNeighborsThreshold to set shouldTurnOn=true and allow auto turn-on. Please provide a water-emitting object or event that invokes IWaterInteractable.WaterHit, or expose a parameterless wrapper method to toggle isOn/notify neighbors.
